Class KeyAst.ProofScript

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyAst<KeYParser.ProofScriptContext>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyAst.ProofScript
Enclosing class:
KeyAst<T extends ParserRuleContext>
public static class KeyAst.ProofScript extends KeyAst<KeYParser.ProofScriptContext>
This struct encapsulate the information of a proof script found in key files.

    • getUri

    • getUri

      public static URI getUri(Token token)

    • asAst

      public List<ScriptCommandAst> asAst()
      Translates this parse tree into an AST usable for the proof script engine. The current representation of a proof script is a list of commands. Each command can hold a list of sub-commands.
      Returns:
      a non-null list of the parsed commands.

    • asAst

      public static @NonNull ScriptBlock asAst(URI file, KeYParser.ProofScriptCodeBlockContext ctx)
